docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,300.00 FILED BY GLADIEUX, ADORIE A. AS TO DEFENDANT TOWNSEND, JAMES E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TOWNSEND, JAMES E.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY TOWNSEND, JAMES E. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GLADIEUX, ADORIE A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF GLADIEUX, ADORIE A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLADIEUX, ADORIE A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOWNSEND, JAMES E. $4,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,336.00, CHECK AND VISA CARD MAY BE USED AS INSTRUMENT IN WRITING AS A WRITTEN AGREEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TOWNSEND, JAMES E. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GLADIEUX, ADORIE A. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT TOWNSEND, JAMES E.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22704, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLADIEUX, ADORIE A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOWNSEND, JAMES E. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, JUDGM. ENTERED IN SUP. COURT #22704 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TOWNSEND, JAMES E. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GLADIEUX, ADORIE A. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TOWNSEND, JAMES E.
NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION/OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF.HEARING- SET FOR MARCH 23-94 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT.6
CLAIM OF EXEMPTION ORDERED GRANTED, EXCEPT FOR THE SUM OF $125. TO BE WITHHELD FROM EACH PAY PERIOD.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $5,454.14 AS TO DEFENDANT TOWNSEND, JAMES E.
